case_title: LIONEL BRACKINS VS. DANTE GUBATINA JR. NOBELA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-08-2021 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO NOV-23-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.PLAINTIFF LOINEL BRACKINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANTE GUBATINA JR. NOBELA IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT'S SMALL CLAIMS BRIEF SUBMITTED TO THE COURT RETAINED IN FILE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $110) SERVED SEP-10-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NOBELA, DANTE GUBATINA JR.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NOBELA, DANTE GUBATINA JR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRACKINS, LIONEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOBELA, DANTE GUBATINA JR. $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,685.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO NOV-23-2021 AT 3:30 P.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-23-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-23-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF LIONEL BRACKINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANTE GUBATINA JR. NOBELA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BRACKINS, LIONEL AS TO DEFENDANT NOBELA, DANTE GUBATINA JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-23-2021 - JUDGMENT.
